resources.description: Anchor a 32-byte hash to Base + Solana mainnet — $0.005 USDC

data.description: Arbitrary JSON to be canonicalized + SHA-256'd by the server. Mutually exclusive with `hash`.

hash.description: 32-byte hex hash (64 chars, no 0x prefix). Mutually exclusive with `data`.

note.description: Optional 200-char note returned in the response (not on-chain).

resources.description: Agent-driven wallet due diligence — multi-step investigation, signed markdown report + JSON sidecar, dual-chain anchored. Async — returns job_id; poll /v1/investigate/status/{job_id} for the deliverable. ETA 5-10 min. $1.77 USDC.

address.description: EVM 0x… (40 hex) or Solana base58 pubkey to investigate.

resources.description: Summarize a URL or pasted text into 3-5 concise bullets. $0.01 USDC.

summary_bullets: Example domain is reserved by IANA for documentation use.
It is safe to use in literature without coordination or permission.

text.description: Pasted text to summarize. Provide either `text` or `url`.

url.description: URL to fetch and summarize. Provide either `text` or `url`.

resources.description: Verifiable RNG — cryptographically-random integer(s) signed by the treasury key. Drop-in VRF for game studios. $0.001 USDC.

commitment.description: Optional 32-byte hex pre-commitment from the caller.

high.description: Inclusive high bound. Must be >= low.

label.description: Optional caller tag, included in the signed payload.

low.description: Inclusive low bound of the integer range.

resources.description: Cross-chain name resolver (ENS, Bonfida SNS) — $0.001 USDC
Read the aura of anything — color, tier (S/A/B/C/D/F), score 0-9999, description. $0.01 USDC.

example.description: Old-money aura. Doesn't need to prove anything to anyone. Has seen things.

target.description: Anything to read the aura of.

resources.description: Sanctions + AML screening for any wallet address — $0.001 USDC

wallet.description: Wallet address — EVM 0x… (40 hex) or Solana base58 pubkey.

resources.description: Yes/no oracle with dual-chain anchored verdict (Base + Solana). $0.05 USDC.

body.question: Will I finish my todo list this week?

example.explanation: Possible if you cut the bottom three items and stop opening Twitter.

question.description: A yes/no question for the oracle.

resources.description: Witty roast of any target — wallet, tweet, idea, code, anything. $0.05 USDC.

example.roast: A wallet so old it remembers when gas was a vibe, not a tax...

target.description: Anything to roast: wallet, tweet, idea, code, etc.

resources.description: Academic letter grade with red-pen marginalia for anything. $0.01 USDC.

body.target: def add(a, b): return a - b  # surely this is correct

marginalia: Function name says 'add' but operator says 'subtract' — pick a side.
The comment is the funniest thing in this codebase.
Add a test and your subconscious will thank you.
example.summary: Strong vibes, weak math. See me after class.
